org.arakhne.neteditor.figlayout

Interface FigureLayout

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractDirectionBasedFigureLayout, AbstractFigureLayout, BasicGridBagFigureLayout, ForceBasedFigureLayout, GanswerSugiyamaFigureLayout

    public interface FigureLayout
    This interface represents all the algorithms that permits to layout figures.
    Version:
    NetEditor Figure Layout $Revision$ 2013-10-23 21:03:08
    Author:
    Marc BAUMGARTNER, Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-figlayout

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Undoable layoutFigures(Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
      Run the laying-out algorithm for the given figures.

    • Method Detail

      • layoutFigures

        Undoable layoutFigures(Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
        Run the laying-out algorithm for the given figures.
        Parameters:
        figures - are the figures to laying out.
        Returns:
        the undoable edit that permits to revert the laying out; or null if the layout does not supports the undo/redo feature or it has nothing to undo.
